prompt: Create a polished vertical promotional illustration of an elegant character-themed café scene, blending realistic photography with high-end anime/fantasy cosplay aesthetics. A young noble-looking character with long pale blonde hair sits at a wooden café table, face intentionally obscured by a plain rectangular skin-tone block, holding a branded takeaway cup near their mouth. The character wears an ornate white military-prince uniform with gold embroidery, gold buttons, braided trim, large fringed epaulettes, a white ruffled cravat, gold cuffs, and a red cape draped over one shoulder. The setting is a warm wooden café named CAFÉ ÉTOILE, with a dark hanging café sign in the upper left, softly glowing round lanterns, shelves and a menu board in the background, and large open windows looking out onto cherry blossom trees and traditional Japanese temple-style architecture in spring daylight. Foreground table items: exactly 4 branded café products and table props: 1 tall takeaway coffee cup with black lid and beige floral label featuring a small framed character portrait and the text “CAFÉ ÉTOILE”, 1 upright kraft paper coffee bag with cherry blossom graphics and “CAFÉ ÉTOILE” printed on it, 1 small standing menu card with the heading “CAFÉ ÉTOILE” and exactly 5 drink lines written in Japanese-style text, and 1 white plate holding a small layered cake slice topped with a pink cherry blossom, with a fork beside it. Use a soft cinematic depth of field, realistic sunlight, warm highlights, delicate sakura petals, cream/gold/brown/pink color palette, premium merchandise-café atmosphere, highly detailed textures, shallow focus on the character and table products, vertical 2:3 composition. Keep all branding consistent with CAFÉ ÉTOILE; no extra logos, no watermark, no modern clutter.
